Work history

Experience

IntrnForte Remote Internship
Machine Learning & Python Intern
July 2025 – August 2025
  • Developed Python programs for data analysis, automation, and problem-solving tasks.
  • Worked with core Python concepts including OOP, file handling, exception handling, and data structures.
  • Performed data cleaning, preprocessing, and visualization using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.
  • Implemented ML algorithms — Linear Regression, Logistic Regression, KNN, Decision Trees, and K-Means Clustering.
  • Built, trained, and evaluated predictive models using Scikit-learn for real-world datasets.
  • Applied supervised and unsupervised learning techniques for classification, regression, and clustering.
  • Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to identify trends and patterns.
  • Created data-driven reports and visualizations to support decision-making.

Things I've built

Projects

🛡️
KAVACH
IoT · ESP32 · Embedded Systems · Defense Technology

A mobile hazard detection platform for identifying hidden mines, explosives, and hazardous objects. Integrates vapor anomaly and coil-based sensing for real-time threat monitoring and alert transmission to soldiers and base stations.

👁️
Face Recognition Attendance
Python · OpenCV · Face Recognition Library · Pandas

Real-time facial recognition system for automated student attendance tracking. Leverages OpenCV for face detection and encoding, with timestamped CSV-based data storage — eliminating manual attendance errors.

🚉
CarryEase
Web Development · RBAC · Booking System

Web-based porter management platform for advance booking at railway stations. Features role-based access for Admin, Customer, and Porter modules with full booking, assignment, and status management workflows.
🥦
NimFresh
Web Development · Inventory Management · Social Impact

Smart grocery and medicine management system with expiry alerts, refill reminders, and a donation feature for near-expiry items to NGOs — combining intelligent inventory tracking with real social impact.
